## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare Growth AI's pitch deck for Madrona Venture Group partner meeting](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Refine messaging to emphasize transition from services to software, showing increasing leverage over time](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Focus on marketing vertical initially, with potential to expand to other knowledge work areas later](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Adjust headcount projections to show FTEs only, demonstrating better efficiency and operating leverage](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Streamline presentation to highlight key use cases, technology platform, and growth trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Topics

### Pitch Deck Refinement

  - [Emphasize "services as software" approach, transitioning to "software as a service" over time](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Focus on marketing vertical initially, with potential to expand to other knowledge work areas](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Adjust first slide to highlight "AI-powered growth platform" instead of "codifying work for AI"](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Show progression: content marketing → full marketing stack → potential expansion to other verticals](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### Technology Platform Presentation

  - [Demonstrate the depth of technology without overwhelming audience](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [Highlight reusable components and ability to quickly adapt for new use cases](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Use Salesforce/Force.com analogy to explain underlying platform potential](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)
  - [Consider moving detailed tech slides to appendix, focusing on high-level capabilities in main deck](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)

### Financial Projections and Headcount

  - [Adjust headcount numbers to show full-time equivalents (FTEs) only, excluding contractors](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=2954.0)
  - [Demonstrate increasing efficiency and leverage over time in ARR per FTE metrics](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=3085.0)
  - [Ensure burn rate includes all costs, including contractors, while showing FTE growth](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=3214.0)
  - [Consider showing slightly depressed ARR per FTE initially to reflect investment in growth](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=3230.0)

### Use Cases and Customer Examples

  - [Add slide showing specific use cases (e.g., editorial refreshes, programmatic SEO, long-form content)](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
  - [Use customer examples (e.g., Ramp, Reforge) to demonstrate land-and-expand strategy](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=2197.0)
  - [Highlight ability to quickly deploy new use cases due to underlying technology platform](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)

### Presentation Strategy

  - [Tailor message for mixed audience (investors, marketing experts, venture partners)](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Balance high-level vision with concrete near-term focus on marketing vertical](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Be prepared to explain efficiency and leverage in the business model](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Revise pitch deck based on feedback, focusing on key areas discussed](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=3495.0)
  - [Send updated deck to Karan by Saturday evening](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=3503.0)
  - [Prepare for partner meeting presentation, anticipating questions on efficiency and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=3511.0)
  - [Consider creating appendix slides for more detailed technical information if needed during Q\&A](https://fathom.video/share/tpqr64EhaoaZsZWMS_fwb9Exx1U6_5gp?tab=summary&timestamp=2646.0)
